workspace.name: Customer Portal Product

records.name: Customer Portal
records.summary: Customer-facing portal for account status, user management, invoices, support requests, and service-health review.

records.name: Account Owners
records.summary: Primary external user group inferred from account-management requirements.

records.summary: Allow eligible users to download invoices from billing-system data.

records.summary: Permission model and audit retention are high-impact decisions requiring human approval.

records.name: Implementation Readiness Gap
records.summary: Implementation, operations, privacy, accessibility, maintenance, and archive decisions remain unresolved.
